Headline: Closure - Malvern St James, Worcestershire
Info: Malvern St James has announced a proposed closure at the end of the academic year, citing a £6 million shortfall exacerbated by declining pupil numbers and the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Closure - Rendcomb College, Gloucestershire
Info: Rendcomb College is set to permanently close this summer after more than a century of operation, with governors attributing the decision to the economic climate, rising costs, and the VAT levy on private schools.

Headline: Financial - Jami'ah Khadijatul Kubra, Birmingham
Info: This independent all-girls Islamic school is facing imminent closure due to a £93,261 deficit and low student numbers, prompting a desperate fundraising campaign to secure its future.

Headline: Financial - State Primary Schools, Nationwide
Info: The National Audit Office has warned that a forecast drop of 56,300 primary pupils by 2027 could lead to a £288 million reduction in per-pupil funding, creating severe financial risks and potential closures for state schools.

Headline: Closure - Rendcomb College, Gloucestershire
Info: Rendcomb College, a 106-year-old independent day and boarding school, has announced its permanent closure at the end of the current academic year due to falling pupil numbers and severe economic pressures linked to the introduction of VAT on fees.

Headline: Financial - Kings Oxford, Oxfordshire
Info: Touchload Limited, the company operating the independent school Kings Oxford, has entered administration due to financial pressures exacerbated by VAT on fees, prompting a rescue deal with a global education group.

Headline: Financial - UK State Schools (State), National
Info: The National Audit Office has warned that state schools have received limited government support to manage the financial risks of falling pupil numbers, predicting a drop of 56,300 primary pupils by 2027 could result in £288 million less in per-pupil funding and potential closures.

Headline: Merger - Big Education Trust and Oasis Community Learning (State), London
Info: The Department for Education has given the official green light for Big Education Trust, a three-school trust in London, to merge with Oasis Community Learning, one of England's largest multi-academy trusts [2.2].

Headline: Closure - Fairview International School, Stirlingshire
Info: Fairview International School has launched a consultation regarding its potential closure, blaming mounting financial challenges and declining pupil enrolment numbers.

Headline: Closure - Immanuel College, London
Info: Immanuel College, the UK's only Jewish private secondary school, has proposed closing this summer due to severe financial pressures following the imposition of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Merger - Radley College and Prep Schools Trust, Oxfordshire
Info: Radley College has officially formed the Radley Schools Group following a major merger with the Prep Schools Trust, bringing together multiple prep schools under a single controlling responsibility.

Headline: Closure - Bentilee Nursery School (State), Stoke-on-Trent
Info: Stoke-on-Trent City Council has proposed the closure of Bentilee Nursery School due to an unsustainable financial deficit that is projected to increase. The council plans to relocate the nursery provision to nearby primary schools operated by a local academy trust.
